items.name: animated-list
items.author: 21stdev
items.description: Cycling list that fades between child items using framer-motion. Useful for notification stacks or rotating testimonials.

items.name: shiny-gradient-button
items.author: aceternity
items.description: Button with a shimmering animated linear-gradient background. Requires the shiny-gradient tailwind animation defined in the bundled config.

items.name: glow-card
items.author: heroui
items.description: Translucent card with a soft, configurable color glow shadow. Accepts an optional glowColor prop (any CSS color string).
